Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes the R1 Concepts website for current brake part products, promotions, and seasonal inventory highlights.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every email features up-to-date product details and pricing, eliminating manual content research and keeping campaigns aligned with current inventory.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a complete daily marketing email—subject line, body copy, and CTAs—tailored to R1 Concepts branding and the scraped product data.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Produces professional, on-brand email content daily without requiring a copywriter, saving hours of creative work and maintaining consistent messaging.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Pushes the AI-generated email into HubSpot Marketing Email, assigns it to the target contact lists, and triggers the send.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Automates the entire email dispatch process to segmented audiences, ensuring daily campaigns go out on schedule without manual HubSpot intervention.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes the Dynamic Friction Company website for current product lines, promotional offers, and featured brake components.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Keeps email content accurately reflecting DFC's latest catalog and deals, removing the need for manual product research each day.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a branded daily marketing email with subject line, persuasive body copy, and product-specific CTAs for DFC's audience.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Delivers fresh, high-quality email creative every day without a dedicated copywriter, enabling consistent outreach that drives engagement.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Uploads the generated email to HubSpot Marketing Email, maps it to DFC contact lists, and initiates the scheduled send.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Fully automates daily email delivery to the right DFC segments, ensuring zero missed sends and freeing the marketing team for strategic tasks.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls incoming support tickets from HubSpot, including customer details, issue descriptions, order references, and ticket metadata.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Centralizes all incoming support requests automatically, ensuring no ticket is missed and giving the AI full context for accurate classification.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies each ticket by issue type (returns, fitment, shipping, etc.) and drafts a contextual reply using R1 Concepts support guidelines and DFC product knowledge.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Dramatically reduces first-response time by auto-categorizing issues and producing draft replies, allowing support agents to review and send rather than write from scratch.

R1 Support Agent.action: Updates the ticket with the AI-assigned classification, attaches the drafted reply, and routes escalated tickets to the appropriate support agent.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Keeps the CRM organized with consistent categorization and ready-to-send responses, cutting average ticket handling time and improving customer satisfaction.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form submissions captured as HubSpot form entries, extracting customer details, issue types, and product references.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Aggregates all Amazon return and issue data from HubSpot in one place, eliminating the need to manually search and export scattered form submissions.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs the extracted issue data into a structured Google Sheet with categorized columns for trend analysis, filtering, and team review.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Gives the team a live, filterable dashboard of customer issues that enables quick pattern detection (e.g., recurring defects or shipping problems) and data-driven decision-making.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot for DFC customer activity signals on the R1 website, such as page visits, product views, and repeat engagement from known contacts.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Captures high-intent buying signals in real time, ensuring the sales team never misses a warm lead actively browsing the R1 catalog.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Sends real-time alerts to the DFC sales team via Microsoft Teams messages and email notifications with customer activity details and recommended follow-up actions.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Enables immediate sales follow-up while customer interest is at its peak, shortening response time from hours to minutes and increasing conversion opportunities.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Will serve as a customer-facing AI assistant on the R1 Concepts website, answering product questions, guiding fitment selection, and handling common support inquiries.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Will provide 24/7 instant customer support, reducing inbound ticket volume and improving the shopping experience with immediate, accurate brake part guidance.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches the web using targeted keywords to discover content creators, blogs, and social profiles relevant to the brand's niche.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Casts a wide discovery net across the open web, surfacing creators that platform-only searches would miss and building a comprehensive initial candidate pool.

Creator Discovery Tool.platform: YouTube API / Instagram Looter API / Google API
Creator Discovery Tool.action: Pulls detailed creator profiles from YouTube and Instagram, including subscriber counts, engagement rates, content themes, and posting frequency.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Enriches each discovered creator with quantitative platform data, enabling informed evaluation rather than guesswork when building the shortlist.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes the aggregated creator data to identify the most relevant candidates, summarize their content focus, and rank them by brand alignment.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Automates hours of manual creator research into a prioritized shortlist, helping the team focus outreach on the highest-potential partnerships.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores discovered creators against customizable weighted criteria such as audience size, engagement quality, niche relevance, content consistency, and brand safety.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Replaces subjective manual vetting with a repeatable, data-driven scoring system that surfaces top-tier creators and filters out poor fits before outreach begins.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves learned outreach sequences, email templates, and brand guidelines from Google Drive to inform the AI's messaging strategy.
Creator Outreach.impact: Ensures every outreach email follows proven sequences and brand standards, maintaining consistency and leveraging historically successful approaches.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach emails for each qualified creator, incorporating their content focus, audience data, and the brand's collaboration offer.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces tailored, high-quality outreach at scale that feels personal to each creator, dramatically increasing response rates compared to generic templates.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails from the team's Gmail account and tracks delivery and open status for follow-up sequencing.
Creator Outreach.impact: Automates the entire email send process and follow-up cadence, enabling the team to reach dozens of creators daily without manual effort.

Creator Reponse.action: Monitors the inbox for creator replies, capturing response content, sentiment, and conversation thread context from ongoing negotiations.
Creator Reponse.impact: Ensures no creator reply goes unnoticed and provides the AI with full conversation history to craft contextually appropriate follow-ups.

Creator Reponse.action: Retrieves past influencer email conversations, negotiation playbooks, and approved deal parameters to guide the AI's response strategy.
Creator Reponse.impact: Leverages institutional knowledge from previous successful negotiations, ensuring the AI responds with proven tactics and stays within approved terms.

Creator Reponse.action: Drafts intelligent reply emails that continue the negotiation, address creator questions, and move the conversation toward a signed partnership agreement.
Creator Reponse.impact: Handles the back-and-forth of creator negotiations autonomously, reducing response time and freeing the team to focus on closing high-value deals.

Creator Reponse.action: Sends the AI-drafted negotiation replies from the team's Gmail account within the existing conversation thread.
Creator Reponse.impact: Maintains seamless, timely communication with creators, keeping negotiations moving forward without delays caused by manual drafting.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Pulls MHM vehicle data and the New Availability Guide, then matches vehicle part numbers against available inventory to identify eligible products.
MHM Load Sheet Automation.impact: Eliminates hours of manual VLOOKUP matching each week, ensuring no eligible parts are missed and the load sheet is always accurate.

MHM Load Sheet Automation.action: Monitors Teams channels for updated vehicle data or sales sheet files needed for the weekly load sheet build.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Creates First to Market email drafts in HubSpot with AI-generated copy, sales sheet assets, and proper formatting ready for review and send.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Extracts lifecycle reporting metrics including email performance, contact growth, and campaign engagement data for the reporting period.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Populates slides 48-55 of the monthly Marketing Highlights deck with formatted metrics, charts, and performance summaries from all data sources.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Analyzes current search performance and identifies keyword gaps where R1 Concepts underperforms compared to competitors.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Accepts uploaded MHM vehicle part number lists and the New Availability Guide file, then matches parts against available inventory in the browser.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Navigates the Attentive dashboard via Chrome browser automation, locates and clones the previous week's MHM SMS campaign.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors a designated Teams channel for a new Excel file uploaded by William Nguyen, detecting the latest Super Session Saturday content.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates B2B-focused SEO blog content targeting automotive shops, distributors, and fleet operators with industry-specific language and keyword optimization.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls weekly search performance data including impressions, clicks, average position, and keyword rankings for DFC blog content.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Provides clear visibility into which blog posts are gaining search traction, enabling data-driven content strategy adjustments.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Collects traffic, engagement, and conversion metrics for all DFC blog pages including sessions, time on page, and goal completions.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Retrieves publishing data and Yoast SEO scores for all blog posts to measure output volume and on-page optimization quality.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls monthly search performance data for R1 Concepts blog content including keyword rankings, impressions, and click-through rates.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Compiles monthly publishing metrics including total posts created, content categories covered, and on-page SEO quality scores.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Pulls the latest weekly performance metrics and the previous month's data from all paid channels.

Monthly Report Bot.action: Extracts full-month performance data from all paid channels at month end.

Monthly Report Bot.action: Sends the formatted monthly report to stakeholders, ready to drop into the end-of-month slide deck.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status data including on-hand quantities, on-order items, and in-transit shipments for backordered parts.
